data.title: DUOL SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Duolingo
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Duolingo to reach out to him for a discussion regarding their options. If you have incurred substantial losses in Duolingo stock or options and wish to explore your legal possibilities, please contact him directly.

data.title: HELE SHAREHOLDER ALERT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Helen of Troy
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced substantial losses in Helen of Troy to reach out to him directly. If you suffered significant losses in Helen of Troy's stock or options, you are encouraged to contact Mr. Wilson to explore your options.

data.title: Visitors from 189 Countries and Regions! Tourism Plus Shanghai 2026 Concluded Successfully!
data.description: Shanghai recently concluded the Tourism Plus Shanghai 2026 event on April 3rd. The expo featured 5 collective exhibitions spread across a vast area of 700,000 square meters. Boasting an impressive participation of over 6,000 exhibitors, the event attracted almost 450,000 visitors hailing from 189 different countries and regions.

data.title: Hedera plans $0.10-$0.12 recovery by May '26, predicting 11-33% rise from current $0.09 level; technical analysis notes oversold conditions.
data.description: According to a recent price prediction, there is a potential 11-33% increase in the value of HBAR from its current price of $0.09. Technical analysis suggests that the market is oversold, with a crucial resistance level noted at $0.10. This information indicates a possible positive movement in the coming period.

data.title: Lido DAO aims for $0.34 resistance by mid-April, currently trading at $0.32 with neutral momentum.
data.description: The Lido DAO is currently trading at $0.32 with a neutral momentum. Technical analysis indicates that there is a possibility of testing the upper Bollinger Band resistance at $0.34 within the next two weeks if the Relative Strength Index (RSI) remains above 50.

data.title: Bitcoin traders lost $337M daily in Q1 2026, totaling $30.9B this year. Onchain data indicates ongoing bearish trend.
data.description: Large holders of Bitcoin, known as whales and sharks, have accumulated losses totalling $30.9 billion in BTC so far this year. This amount is strikingly similar to the losses incurred during the 2022 bear market. Data relating to Bitcoin transactions on the blockchain indicates the potential for further declines in the cryptocurrency's value.

data.title: ALGO aims to hit $0.16 in May; $0.13-$0.14 short-term, $0.16-$0.19 medium-term. Bullish breakout at $0.13, support at $0.11.

data.title: Expect ARB to reach $0.10-0.11 by May with mixed signals on technical indicators. Bearish MACD needs caution.

data.title: Tether considers postponing fundraising at $500B valuation if demand is low, exceeding major US banks' size.
data.description: With a valuation of $500 billion, Tether would outrank all US banks except for JPMorgan Chase. This places Tether above Bank of America and positions it as one of the largest financial institutions globally.
